subject: Did You Hear? President Trump is Coming Back to Georgia!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/740d19d3e201/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-67527?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| Hey there,
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this exciting news – President Trump is coming back to Georgia TOMORROW! Join him in Dalton for an election-eve victory rally to support Senators Perdue and Loeffler in the home stretch of the runoff.
We hope to see you there! \- Team Perdue
# **Victory Rally featuring President Donald J. Trump, Senator David Perdue, Senator Kelly Loeffler, and other republicans**
_Mon, January 04, 2021 _ 09:00 pm (EST) Doors Open: 05:00 pm Dalton Regional Airport 4485 Airport Rd SE Dalton, GA, 30721
---
|
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8ed74920ef&e=02cd889ad3 "GET TICKETS")

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Don’t miss a thing!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Are we connected on social media? >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/88b54db909b85d91/e4899593c487abffc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, As the 117th Session of Congress kicks off, I want to reach out again to say thank you for trusting me to represent you in Washington, DC. This is one of the greatest honors of my life, and I'm going to do all I can to make sure your voice is heard in Washington, DC! This is shaping up to be an incredibly busy session already. I'll do all I can to keep you informed via email, but please like my page on Facebook and follow me on Twitter for the latest updates. **[Tap or click HERE to visit and ‘Like’ my page on Facebook!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/88b54db909b85d91/3d42c5a35f20ae6cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** **[Tap or click HERE to visit and 'Follow’ my Twitter account!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/88b54db909b85d91/c1261a18f97772cac3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I’m going to do everything in my power in 2021 and beyond to ensure your freedom of speech, your Second Amendment Rights, and uphold the sanctity of life. As the incoming Chairman of the Republican Study Committee Budget and Spending Task Force, I’m going to be working hard with a group of strong fiscal conservatives to propose a budget that will balance & start paying down our national debt. We need to figure this out now instead of saddling our children and grandchild with unprecedented debt. There are going to be a lot of moving parts in the 117th Congress, and I want to make sure you always have the latest news. Please follow me on Facebook and Twitter to make sure you’re always up to date! See you online,
Kevin Hern id:2020-12-18-16:01:49:050t Paid For By Hern For Congress
---

This email was sent by: Kevin Hern
9521-B Riverside Pkwy, #350, Tulsa, OK, 74137
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0&c=34143&jid=88b54db909b85d91)

subject: election fraud
body:
I will not be voting to certify.... No images? [Click here](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xkljulk-vkreeut-t/) [](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xkljulk-vkreeut-r/)
### **Note from Senator Braun**
**I will not be voting to certify the election results. Read more below about our important effort to investigate unprecedented allegations of voter fraud and illegal conduct in the 2020 election. ****\- Sen. Mike Braun**
# **Fox News: [GOP senators to object to Electoral College certification, demand emergency audit](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xkljulk-vkreeut-y/)**
# Lawmakers call for an electoral commission to be established to audit results.
A coalition of GOP senators and senators-elect, led by Sen. Ted Cruz, will object to the Jan. 6 certification of the presidential election results when a joint session of Congress meets next week unless there is an emergency 10-day audit of the results by an electoral commission.Cruz -- along with Sens. Ron Johnson, R-Wis.; James Lankford, R-Okla.; Steve Daines, R-Mont.; John Kennedy, R-La.; Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., and **Mike Braun, R-Ind.** ; as well as Sens.-elect Cynthia Lummis, R-Wyo.; Roger Marshall, R-Kansas; Bill Hagerty, R-Tenn., and Tommy Tuberville, R-Ala. -- say that the election "featured unprecedented allegations of voter fraud and illegal conduct."Their effort is separate from one announced by Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., who said this week that he would object to what he said was the failure of some states -- most notably Pennsylvania -- to follow their own election laws.** "Voter fraud has posed a persistent challenge in our elections, although its breadth and scope are disputed. By any measure, the allegations of fraud and irregularities in the 2020 election exceed any in our lifetimes," the lawmakers say in a statement.**A source familiar with the effort told Fox News that it was Cruz who orchestrated the effort, working with other senators to organize the push against the certification and call for the electoral commission with just days to go before the joint session of Congress.The lawmakers say there is a precedent of Democrats objecting to election results in 1969, 2001, 2005 and 2019: "And, in both 1969 and 2005, a Democratic Senator joined with a Democratic House Member in forcing votes in both houses on whether to accept the presidential electors being challenged," they say.Cruz: I agreed to argue Pa. election case because US needs 'resolution'. The senators and senators-elect are calling for Congress to appoint an Electoral Commission to conduct a 10-day emergency audit of the election returns in states where the results are disputed. They cite as precedent the 1877 between Samuel Hayes and Rutherford Hayes, where there were allegations of fraud in multiple states.

"In 1877, Congress did not ignore those allegations, nor did the media simply dismiss those raising them as radicals trying to undermine democracy," the lawmakers say. "Instead, Congress appointed an Electoral Commission -- consisting of five Senators, five House Members, and five Supreme Court Justices -- to consider and resolve the disputed returns.""We should follow that precedent. To wit, Congress should immediately appoint an Electoral Commission, with full investigatory and fact-finding authority, to conduct an emergency 10-day audit of the election returns in the disputed states. Once completed, individual states would evaluate the Commission's findings and could convene a special legislative session to certify a change in their vote, if needed," they say.Without that, they will vote against the certification.**" Accordingly, we intend to vote on January 6 to reject the electors from disputed states as not 'regularly given' and 'lawfully certified' (the statutory requisite), unless and until that emergency 10-day audit is completed," they say in the statement.**It is unclear whether they will rally more Republicans to their cause, and the lawmakers note that most Democrats and some Republicans will vote to certify the results, but say that an audit would increase the public's faith in the process."These are matters worthy of the Congress, and entrusted to us to defend. We do not take this action lightly. We are acting not to thwart the democratic process, but rather to protect it," they say. "And every one of us should act together to ensure that the election was lawfully conducted under the Constitution and to do everything we can to restore faith in our Democracy."The new effort by the senators marks a major win for President Trump's efforts to challenge the results of the election. Trump has repeatedly claimed he beat Biden, who flipped a number of red states including Georgia and Arizona to get over the 270 Electoral College votes needed to secure the White House.Trump's campaign has launched a number of legal challenges, while Trump himself has urged states with Republican governors and legislatures to overturn Biden's victories -- as he alleges widespread voter fraud tilted the scales to Biden.Senate GOP leaders are against efforts to challenge Biden's win, with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell recognizing the former vice president's victory, and behind closed doors urging Senate Republicans not to contest the election results.But if the GOP senators object, with a similar effort by House Republicans, the joint session of Congress would be dissolved and the House and Senate would then meet separately for two hours to debate a contested state's electoral vote.Each body would then vote whether to accept or reject that state's slate of electoral votes. Then the House and Senate reconvene in the joint session. In the House, at least 10 incoming House GOP freshmen will back Rep. Mo Brooks' effort to object to the certification of the presidential election results on Jan. 6.The last time this happened (and only the second time in U.S. history) was in January 2005, following President' George W. Bush's narrow reelection victory over Democratic challenger Sen. John Kerry of Massachusetts. One Senate Democrat - Sen. Barbara Boxer of California - and one House Democrat - Rep. Stephanie Tubbs Jones - objected. In 2017, a handful of House Democrats objected to Trump's victory over Democratic nominee Hillary Clinton, but no Senate Democrats joined them.A state's slate of electoral votes would only be thrown out if both the House and Senate vote to do so -- something that is unlikely given the Democratic majority in the House, and the push by GOP Senate leaders to certify. [](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xkljulk-vkreeut-j/) MIKE BRAUN FOR INDIANA
PO BOX 159
ZIONSVILLE, IN 460777 [Unsubscribe](https://mbfi.cmail19.com/t/t-u-xkljulk-vkreeut-i/)
---

subject: BREAKING: FOOTAGE REVEALS WARNOCK WOULD DEFUND THE POLICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, JANUARY 4, 2021
BREAKING: FOOTAGE REVEALS WARNOCK WOULD DEFUND THE POLICE
ATLANTA - Today, bombshell footage definitively [confirms](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078Bwld41zw56kEIlNZsxCdVLjv3ATMoywqC7mwpwWiYhTG9nqy2_oStQxjpWQ6aJk6wI693Uj489KLS6BFkgBq_30FJOhNJvti7Q3DkwiQ6n2XKTHf7DDWiV7QSMQPZ7-4wtKDCNZtiR1T6EWvLSQaROFw68PbeLzLHI7Aq8xU17wu5f0=&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) that Raphael Warnock would defund the police if elected to the U.S. Senate. The [newly surfaced video clip](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078BwldVy9-53eAaFOb7UcLz6AmX3KDW785h2Kq61lA2ETBk552eOTpErVArvkS69FovGwmqUJKs8kO6YJwFdEEiU5_YKxX3kWSKuSf2rueH0jKPcNgUe23eyF-GkwOYFj70fiTlMFJHk68Y2iyK53vFISocw==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) shows two members of the Warnock campaign slamming law enforcement and revealing Warnock's true intentions to defund the police.
When asked point-blank if Warnock would support "defunding" the police, one staff member [answers](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078BwldMhmIiDxJZVwAzNlQI_PVLa5Q8fDotzqiiIDrc8dABx0q_U-nhd9QIw-4DH9HmuiB2WtD6Nx9P0JnlX-TsUkZeJnmHpf9KmTPOQivauwYLXj3GJT8LPu9JceVV0leyMlxm1bTCBoByIA=&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) "absolutely," also stating that "most [police officers] are bad." Another staff member states that, "In reality, [Warnock's] whole platform with police reform is along the lines of the same people who are saying 'defund the police.'"
This damning video comes as the latest chapter of Warnock's history of disrespecting and attacking law enforcement. He has [called](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKK1XkxHlb_pFNKo0az2G8JMjQcYxrF7G73Y_5gSCcKcwr8ObL7Efb-BgWf9iEDZ7q5Ut6JmEZhzj4c8r9YC4N6LTfNQvyzpkzEg5dfnZdZv9tG00mSpr_OzmcQNBP3FHti1OXGacsgwXyu1b_iEUprciVvOiBaQ5BQ==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) police officers "gangsters," "bullies," "thugs," and a "danger" to our children. Warnock was [arrested](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078BwldfBEXh9fR2yCo8HPfzXchJjYe3-fGkHBNQPS7kaYtb2_3odYWgZc3RxPad-Uzs7wzpN8lKVrOXj62VXJYyrqQLFvzYQ1STOkdlbMuFNR8meIglYDz8TcJvaha2bTgYACZZRX73obfRqNmBxMe-_bFiw==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) for obstructing a police investigation into child [abuse](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKLsMdUAqwQCYMeemz6Wr9ak_eBSxtfueVfqpwsLkLdm5Z-8Dz7XRjdS3tSJ81Po6bGo4aW7fwXCXc-08JjmZar39tCVsyXePC1NB8czDa0cwClLcniTx7uKO0gVf-NsR3WfCZ5ChhICRWVvRSTpzSPywFFPRyhosyf3_sT7lRBwD&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) at a church summer camp he ran, where the arresting officer had "never encountered resistance like [Warnock's] at all." He has [called for](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078BwldXyZ3z4_DZdkyJVNfL7sQE2WoFxZc3PhT__OlNZ1xjAEw8V_jWn_Kj4epYQ9W6WEXt1z448GSOMlpYR6kA6fPVTdhrQLhFSbsLwktE6MyKbSS1DYkNi_e6xqdKAi0hekako3CO6P0XuAE0K5Sbl79WHpcIwCMNv0051iJqbS01ugYh8zjvQJWPA==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) police to "open up the jails," and he even [defended](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKDXsRy9a1FlOCfmscE3baND_ooEtc3i6AaTsqeBwR-ti0eiWAb19lgqW0NJQvSGsDWsnjlmBxXo8G4DT0pXAtvi6q0bzCZymKDu2FkGFJkzCfNXx2SMaMm7_l-yKtbPB6PARhphFhDnu7R-dUnH0EtJOBK90IwGzimNa7jVSTC-6-2PZ4USPRCvPGJh8fwDPolv90SoVrSGEcmcDNlB4MVzXeUSCsENdEg==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==) a convicted cop killer.
To view the Warnock campaign expose Raphael as the anti-police radical he is, click the image below:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8fsxHRFVRAbjnbILJ21lB-auPg92RJX05rn5YB8wK5leJlfEH9YKGhLS078BwldVy9-53eAaFOb7UcLz6AmX3KDW785h2Kq61lA2ETBk552eOTpErVArvkS69FovGwmqUJKs8kO6YJwFdEEiU5_YKxX3kWSKuSf2rueH0jKPcNgUe23eyF-GkwOYFj70fiTlMFJHk68Y2iyK53vFISocw==&c=V_33R_qk12Yg0U1yLIhOsJqk3P8HpHnfUWgtDoPRX-XLwWZwGXnfJw==&ch=jQuez6sryfM_f_IOisKqtYOyBFo9g1sOryfLYItV_vdNqd5SxXqfsw==)
---
| TRANSCRIPT HIGHLIGHTS:
Warnock Staffer: "You know police officers are not all good, you know what I am saying? Most of them are bad, we know that."
...
Warnock Staffer: "So, he [Warnock] avoids using 'defund the police' because he knows that the Republicans are going to try to grab onto it [the phrase] and attack, right? But in reality, his whole platform with police reform is along the lines of the same people who are saying 'defund the police,' just not using the same rhetoric."
...
Journalist: "But he is on our side for defunding these suckers in blue, these police? He's on our side on that?"
Warnock Staffer: "Absolutely! Absolutely!"

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Perdue on Fox News: I Am Delighted President Trump is Coming to Dalton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
---
| | _ _**Perdue on Fox News: I Am Delighted President Trump is Coming to Dalton**
_"We've often said on our bus tour, 'If we win Georgia, we save America' -- that's not a slogan, it's the absolute truth" _
---
| Senator David Perdue joined Steve Hilton on Fox News' _The Next Revolution_ tonight to discuss irregularities in the November election, President Trump's visit to Georgia tomorrow, and what a Democrat Majority in the Senate would mean for America.

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9198af57a7&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the full segment.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=03ce2afae9&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Joins Our Revolution With Steve Hilton")
---
| **HIGHLIGHTS**
**
On Raffensperger's Decision to Leak a Private Call with President Trump**

_"I'm still shocked a member of the Republican Party would tape a sitting President and then leak that. That's disgusting in my view. The President has said...we've had some irregularities in the election in November and he wants some answers. He has not gotten them yet from our Secretary of State and it's one reason I asked for him to resign and we've not gotten them from our state legislature because there's been no special session called. And then the President went to court and I went to court and the courts have denied us hearings saying it's more of a legislative issue... What the President said in this tape today is no different than what he's been saying for the last two months."_

**On President Trump's Upcoming Visit to Dalton**

_"Some two and half million people [in Georgia] voted for Donald Trump in November. Two and half million people voted for me. He's going to remind them that the future of the country is in their hands... He is coming down here to win this election because he knows what is at stake. Not only do we not only need to hold off this radical socialist and very dangerous agenda the Democrats are trying to perpetrate, but also to protect what Donald Trump and this agenda have achieved over the last four years... The Democrats know they can't win if we get our vote out. That is what the President is coming here to do and that's what we've been working to do and I am delighted that he is coming. I think we will show the world that the people in Georgia know what is at stake here and we will hold the line here in Georgia. We've often said in our bus tour 'If we win Georgia, we save America' and it's not a slogan, it's the absolute truth, Steve."_

**On What a Democrat Majority Would Mean for America **

_"The most telling thing is what Schumer said two months ago. He said, 'I haven't worked this hard to become the Majority Leader not to get everything done that we want to get done.' He's talking about total control, Steve, as you have called out. He wants total power. He's going to change the voting rules. He's going to stack the Supreme Court. He's going to add Democrats into the Senate and eventually he wants to do away with the Electoral College. That is the only way they will ever be able to perpetrate this socialist agenda that is so dangerous." _

David Perdue Joins Our Revolution With Steve Hilton" | HIGHLIGHTS On Raffensperger's Decision to Leak a Private Call with President Trump "I'm still shocked a member of the Republican Party would tape a sitting President and then leak that. That's disgusting in my view. The President has said...we've had some irregularities in the election in November and he wants some answers. name: Michelle Steel
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Today, I have a humble request, %%First Name%%. But before I ask, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why your support is critical to this campaign.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ii0p6JhsrGxC6LJaFGGS8NYqEkpWiXSXZKI3bvfDq3cjp14Tg7ipscE3ZgHnxsotmlZ83cPbrr19lPp19JN5603Y7L6woaSYpEinhfLUKWR9TNqlHZZuLAVRhqwEAQYJgl5d3knK0fe65mkFLX41pl4933EpVdpDpzvPiJhQKJYFhpH_VgqS8U4QM6KrDfSZo6c-HIcLbFyRArjhQiGWM9ThQzAJkXAGgESfokBjKjVI8LdHZJidkN0DGNF1fdIJ2ji_9vPMhXDP8V1IOO20O8cuNb0Ay3pFDoFheP6wAxJ66ehU-Iczl-7CnbYyrio9cxoQPU6JVkZgW-YkkBNNohynTO4k_Lck-NPbLXLs110NJiLKrGs3S9LLFWvD08K4&c=0PoaiK-qO8DOi2KtpUcJgnCapxE2Pu27lLdiXfxiMmnz6CVbxtxo1A==&ch=hKd832JTTHC8ruCZehuhfK7mUw_UlBGGz5FWrjtZqlAGtAD68tTGSQ==)
Today, I have a humble request, Friend. But before I ask, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why your support is critical to this campaign.

I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve and found a government failing the people who needed it most. I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight.

It was then I decided enough is enough. I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother -- and won. Since then I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet.

**But I can 't do it alone. clean_body: Today, I have a humble request, %%First Name%%. But before I ask, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why your support is critical to this campaign. ** . == Today, I have a humble request, Friend. But before I ask, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why your support is critical to this campaign. I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve and found a government failing the people who needed it most. I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight. It was then I decided enough is enough. I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother -- and won. Since then I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet. But I can 't do it alone. == == | ==** I'm proud to be one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. And now it's time to make sure the American Dream is still achievable for all Americans. But it will be an uphill battle. Our Far Left opponent -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- is gunning for a rematch and the future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win. This seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED -- remains a top-target. The Democrats have already spent millions against us and they're prepared to spend millions more to buy this seat out from under us. == Once again, we're facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you -- and only then, I know we can win again. The Left has lost it.

Friend -- I've had enough.

I've had enough of the liberal media spreading lies, the radical leftists in Congress tearing down our institutions, and the constant threats to the safety of law abiding citizens.

That's why, on the eve of the most important election in American history, I'm reaching out to you and asking for your support one last time. You already know what is on the line in this race, so I'll keep this quick.

Nancy Pelosi is fed up, Friend. _She lost over 10 seats across the nation -- 4 of them right here in California, right in her backyard!_ Pelosi's fully prepared to multiply the $20+ million they've already spent against us if it means keeping the House Majority.

But nothing is more important than our grassroots. [**So, Friend, this comes down to you.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2ptilAnxhOJmeBNIcUxY_dxrE9LxeZaym7odiWTR8HSRwSJIbKqc4WOV8AzZEAMWjREWM38otxSQuL_WpWh7j0WYw_pa6BjN56TNxKsvwgygKF51JIRO43qj_r29Im24EPhOSRF-CPNJYtUBnGD76rjx7WA0Wh0nTbewKCeR6KKE2Ce9MzOWEoJJG7XZ3CJY9iGaR0Qy4QUFN9KwJvA6xKmbh4Qva9INFWLabyeZIfYnNDBD7QPoNjsEumWWK3tNEUwfmQAvUzLBiXXIfOZ5MNljPhOeAtdgn-WXIcWaPA3G3wNOcLh4_2JqVaF6o0z_FNc9ovPgp76g3u2tdSJwfb7eJC42q2lP3Hrv6ph8iMlZupIpMFU7TanhYR_jUoBYRYeSH-V7ngMSg4KVZCNRAfhl6Mg-o9yhclRztMJDif0wNq5owDSSmd8_6X8QCDejpYKO49V2yyk0rGe16nAFA==&c=zzB198LejCQAZTWiVDx5b7vcVMtKm1Oux1XAAnFFSZskCcKW80qlig==&ch=c_53VZxEtPT67T0D_2fXmtReFyEIrOy-GCbPNANKn0FMidKsOf8ocQ==)

I am committed to restoring common sense leadership to California and providing better, brighter futures for all Californians -- [_**but to do this, I need to know I can count on you.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2ptilAnxhOJmeBNIcUxY_dxrE9LxeZaym7odiWTR8HSRwSJIbKqc4WOV8AzZEAMWjREWM38otxSQuL_WpWh7j0WYw_pa6BjN56TNxKsvwgygKF51JIRO43qj_r29Im24EPhOSRF-CPNJYtUBnGD76rjx7WA0Wh0nTbewKCeR6KKE2Ce9MzOWEoJJG7XZ3CJY9iGaR0Qy4QUFN9KwJvA6xKmbh4Qva9INFWLabyeZIfYnNDBD7QPoNjsEumWWK3tNEUwfmQAvUzLBiXXIfOZ5MNljPhOeAtdgn-WXIcWaPA3G3wNOcLh4_2JqVaF6o0z_FNc9ovPgp76g3u2tdSJwfb7eJC42q2lP3Hrv6ph8iMlZupIpMFU7TanhYR_jUoBYRYeSH-V7ngMSg4KVZCNRAfhl6Mg-o9yhclRztMJDif0wNq5owDSSmd8_6X8QCDejpYKO49V2yyk0rGe16nAFA==&c=zzB198LejCQAZTWiVDx5b7vcVMtKm1Oux1XAAnFFSZskCcKW80qlig==&ch=c_53VZxEtPT67T0D_2fXmtReFyEIrOy-GCbPNANKn0FMidKsOf8ocQ==)

body:
We don't agree with Newsom's out of control, far left agenda and he deserves to know! Will you take one minute to rate Gavin's performance as Governor?

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tX4wYgZj0nvXX1aYjuR77DGkcTZTy_rGMiQ7BZRfiMQIl2j-4DPUalqMW83ItcfMLXyJZK342vCdLAaQR0RhdJmBGatT5vNXDBUWyEosyH6GgMBe2h2pkz9_L267joLVECm_pp2aPsM15p3gJT-jPmU7xgMAkavbQSj2gwo4VRij4X7ZXZns9ezApxCx26YvFs4KLMRO6BZmrh4adMg9nOklTfHNi_bLqPXLL1VWtTo0XYiroU3-OiBUs2GXhOqSY4ji0NpfbK7PmUElsMucTHgBNuIDWcUCmtRG9uYObBIXEj-i2OHeBA07MR92AhYoEWprUDGh0tVsEBYC2_OVfRl_43NFhYidbMlB1aoAdomKcI5kBL-lXtbmMaeywvSL9H1DRF5Cpho3eiew3uyAGTcqGTAr9yTVJYNIzRZlgXE=&c=FbKjFLubcOrHk_b05hqyj6AQ_Sc6OD5Er4O1hEM1i9-X8QOD4Gbotw==&ch=ryGZF8M2Y7RjaihXs5SrvSV5GbdWxfj7VQD3vU8SFDrOLw1v3vC5EA==)

[**TELL GAVIN YOU DISAGREE -- GRADE HIS PERFORMANCE AS GOVERNOR**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tX4wYgZj0nvXX1aYjuR77DGkcTZTy_rGMiQ7BZRfiMQIl2j-4DPUavduDB3xcPpAVbmrMRp1XrwfN7pOpe4pTCVGczx9Kszhyw-Og8QdQ_auIQBhFNQ2NCujUG7XNKLQLX1ZL-1GwVAcvCzudJxN7DE_c8FQYQVtuzOVNniqdwJIoeqZz0_sfWI5DyPr9NHwRP4-93foT4D5-EYOuE7yc2_BkdQMezOB81yq2we95vGHfZ3TFVUP7zzN_CgFFZOIqhDM1SVA3e2Hr5RyIFQHvR6-kyELsWLa4qZmkss48tUr49qQNwsUKzlXDNDDnH0W1AaclYfPXqLTcpoSHNdyqEM7hjxqzWaU2IaV1gN7iariJvy2aD4F1ethu2KnkO8Ho6lZwlYzTPznONBN3cn9aCqYb6Y4OuVaD58yq9uwKxw=&c=FbKjFLubcOrHk_b05hqyj6AQ_Sc6OD5Er4O1hEM1i9-X8QOD4Gbotw==&ch=ryGZF8M2Y7RjaihXs5SrvSV5GbdWxfj7VQD3vU8SFDrOLw1v3vC5EA==)
We don't agree with Newsom's out of control, far left agenda and he deserves to know! _Will you take one minute to rate Gavin 's performance as Governor?_
[**TELL GAVIN HOW HE 'S DOING**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tX4wYgZj0nvXX1aYjuR77DGkcTZTy_rGMiQ7BZRfiMQIl2j-4DPUavduDB3xcPpAVbmrMRp1XrwfN7pOpe4pTCVGczx9Kszhyw-Og8QdQ_auIQBhFNQ2NCujUG7XNKLQLX1ZL-1GwVAcvCzudJxN7DE_c8FQYQVtuzOVNniqdwJIoeqZz0_sfWI5DyPr9NHwRP4-93foT4D5-EYOuE7yc2_BkdQMezOB81yq2we95vGHfZ3TFVUP7zzN_CgFFZOIqhDM1SVA3e2Hr5RyIFQHvR6-kyELsWLa4qZmkss48tUr49qQNwsUKzlXDNDDnH0W1AaclYfPXqLTcpoSHNdyqEM7hjxqzWaU2IaV1gN7iariJvy2aD4F1ethu2KnkO8Ho6lZwlYzTPznONBN3cn9aCqYb6Y4OuVaD58yq9uwKxw=&c=FbKjFLubcOrHk_b05hqyj6AQ_Sc6OD5Er4O1hEM1i9-X8QOD4Gbotw==&ch=ryGZF8M2Y7RjaihXs5SrvSV5GbdWxfj7VQD3vU8SFDrOLw1v3vC5EA==)
California has had a slew of extremely liberal Governors, but Newsom takes the cake. From signing AB5 to banning gas-powered cars to embracing job killing regulations that drive companies out of our state, Governor Newsom is ignoring the real problems facing our great state.

He's gone too far and we've had enough. [**So please, give Gavin the grade he deserves.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tX4wYgZj0nvXX1aYjuR77DGkcTZTy_rGMiQ7BZRfiMQIl2j-4DPUavduDB3xcPpAVbmrMRp1XrwfN7pOpe4pTCVGczx9Kszhyw-Og8QdQ_auIQBhFNQ2NCujUG7XNKLQLX1ZL-1GwVAcvCzudJxN7DE_c8FQYQVtuzOVNniqdwJIoeqZz0_sfWI5DyPr9NHwRP4-93foT4D5-EYOuE7yc2_BkdQMezOB81yq2we95vGHfZ3TFVUP7zzN_CgFFZOIqhDM1SVA3e2Hr5RyIFQHvR6-kyELsWLa4qZmkss48tUr49qQNwsUKzlXDNDDnH0W1AaclYfPXqLTcpoSHNdyqEM7hjxqzWaU2IaV1gN7iariJvy2aD4F1ethu2KnkO8Ho6lZwlYzTPznONBN3cn9aCqYb6Y4OuVaD58yq9uwKxw=&c=FbKjFLubcOrHk_b05hqyj6AQ_Sc6OD5Er4O1hEM1i9-X8QOD4Gbotw==&ch=ryGZF8M2Y7RjaihXs5SrvSV5GbdWxfj7VQD3vU8SFDrOLw1v3vC5EA==)

body:

I will always vote for legislation that strengthens our military and protects law enforcement, legislation that makes the United States more prosperous, and any bill that spurs job creation, defends American citizens and protects the unborn.
_**But I can 't vote for our shared conservative values unless I win re-election tomorrow.**_

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: quick note (Georgia)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We're just 1 day out from the Georgia runoff election that will decide Senate control.
Hi there, this will be quick -- and I really need your help:
1\. We're just 1 day out from the Georgia runoff election that will decide Senate control.
2\. My Republican opponent is spending over $23 MILLION to defeat me -- and Mitch McConnell and his national GOP allies are planning on spending millions more to buy this seat.
3\. Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, we won't be able to reach critical voters during this final stretch -- and we'd be throwing away our last and only chance to take back the Senate.
We cannot give McConnell and the GOP another two years in power -- but according to analysts at The Washington Post, that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground Senate race.
**Please, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our MUST-HIT midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now:**
[**Will you give $3 before midnight tonight to fund our GOTV efforts, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc78b/2a380d31/21c45000/f0575c/1274228750/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEwNF93YXJub2NrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210104_warnock_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: TOMORROW is Election Day in Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b8c/2591087575/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Georgia voters-- **tomorrow, January 5, is Election Day!** Your last opportunity to make your voice heard in the U.S. Senate and Public Service Commission runoff elections is right around the corner. **A few things to remember when you head to the polls on Election Day:**
* Polls will be open tomorrow from 7am to 7pm.
* You should vote only at YOUR assigned Election Day polling place. Your Election Day polling place likely differs from your early voting location options, so double check your Election Day polling place by going to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b8d/2591087575/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or calling the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816.
* You must take [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b8a/2591087575/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you when you head to the polls.

**Requested a ballot but haven 't received it? **You can vote in person on Election Day! Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested mail ballot and vote in person instead. Go to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b8d/2591087575/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") to find your assigned polling place. **Received your mail ballot but haven 't returned it?** Don't wait! Mail ballots must be in a dropbox or received by your county elections office BEFORE 7pm on Tuesday, January 5. If you have your mail ballot, here's what you need to do:
* Follow the instructions on your mail ballot and complete it now.
* Remember to sign the oath on the back of the envelope.
* Visit [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b8b/2591087575/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") to find a drop box location in your county (most counties have them); you can also return your ballot directly to your county elections office if your county does not have a drop box available.
* Once you return your ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b88/2591087575/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") so you can check to make sure your ballot is received.

**Already voted and looking for another way to help?** Encourage everyone you know to vote on Tuesday or return their ballot, then [chip in a direct contribution to Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b89/2591087575/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgiasenate?refcode=IE010421RWO")! You can also volunteer for New Georgia Project's Election Day line warming program in one of the following counties: [Muscogee](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b96/2591087575/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367647/"), [Dougherty](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b97/2591087575/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367650/"), [Richmond](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b94/2591087575/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367651/"), [Chatham](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b95/2591087575/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367646/"), [Gwinnett](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b92/2591087575/VEsHBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367654/"), [Cobb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b93/2591087575/VEsHBg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367649/"), [DeKalb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b90/2591087575/VEsHAQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367653/"), [Clayton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b91/2591087575/VEsHAA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367645/"), [Fulton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b9e/2591087575/VEsHAw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367652/"), or [Bibb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b9f/2591087575/VEsHAg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367648/"). We need all hands on deck to ensure each and every eligible Georgia voter has the opportunity to cast their vote and make their voice heard. For more information, check out [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b9c/2591087575/VEsHDQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/"). If you have questions or need help please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. After you vote, [tell us about your voting experience](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30f/34a064cc/1d63bea9/7027b9d/2591087575/VEsHDA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform")! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Do you have your mail ballot but would like to vote in person? clean_body: | "" | | Friend - Georgia voters-- tomorrow, January 5, is Election Day! Your last opportunity to make your voice heard in the U.S. Senate and Public Service Commission runoff elections is right around the corner. A few things to remember when you head to the polls on Election Day: Polls will be open tomorrow from 7am to 7pm. You should vote only at YOUR assigned Election Day polling place. Your Election Day polling place likely differs from your early voting location options, so double check your Election Day polling place by going to "" or calling the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. You must take "" with you when you head to the polls. Requested a ballot but haven 't received it? You can vote in person on Election Day! Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested mail ballot and vote in person instead. Go to "" to find your assigned polling place. Received your mail ballot but haven 't returned it? Don't wait! Mail ballots must be in a dropbox or received by your county elections office BEFORE 7pm on Tuesday, January 5. If you have your mail ballot, here's what you need to do: Follow the instructions on your mail ballot and complete it now. Remember to sign the oath on the back of the envelope. Visit "" to find a drop box location in your county (most counties have them); you can also return your ballot directly to your county elections office if your county does not have a drop box available. Once you return your ballot, go to "" so you can check to make sure your ballot is received. Already voted and looking for another way to help?** Encourage everyone you know to vote on Tuesday or return their ballot, then ""! You can also volunteer for New Georgia Project's Election Day line warming program in one of the following counties: "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", or "". We need all hands on deck to ensure each and every eligible Georgia voter has the opportunity to cast their vote and make their voice heard. For more information, check out "". If you have questions or need help please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. After you vote, ""! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Do you have your mail ballot but would like to vote in person? Watch "" from Fair Fight CEO Lauren Groh-Wargo about how to cancel your mail ballot so you can vote in person! | ---|---|--- | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2020 Fair Fight PAC, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: the next 24 hours will make or break Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Missing our goal could end Democrats' chances of winning in Georgia -- and our only chance of taking back the Senate.
Hi there: Tomorrow, my Georgia special election runoff will decide Senate control -- but recent polls still show our race locked in a dead heat. We're making one last push to reach Georgia voters before it's too late, but as of now, we're still $6,507 short of what we need by midnight to make it happen.
Missing our goal could end Democrats' chances of winning in Georgia -- and our only chance of taking back the Senate. That's why Senator Hassan said I could reach out with some amazing news: **A generous group of donors just stepped up to match all gifts, but only until midnight tonight.**
**Senate control comes down to what we do in the next 24 hours -- meaning your support is more important than ever. [Will you rush $3 or more right now? Every dollar will be _doubled_ to help me win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc787/2a380d31/21bf5a0d/f05787/3026030811/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEwNF93YXJub2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210104_warnock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Tomorrow's election is about Georgians, but it's also about so much else. It's about protecting the future of our nation from the GOP's corrupt agenda. But right now, my unelected, right-wing opponent is pouring _$23 million_ of her personal fortune into Georgia to buy this seat -- with right-wing outside groups funneling _hundreds of millions_ more into propping up her and their majority.
I've dedicated my life to service, and I'm here to give working families the leadership they deserve. But we're nearly out of time, and we could miss our opportunity to put the American people first without your immediate grassroots donation.
[**Please, will you pitch in $3 or more to help hit our goal before this match expires at midnight? Every dollar you give will go twice as far to help me win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc787/2a380d31/21bf5a0d/f05787/3026030811/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEwNF93YXJub2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210104_warnock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you so much. Your support couldn't be more critical.
Your friend,
Raphael Warnock
P.S. GOP super PACs are investing more than $150 million to defeat me. If we lose, we face at least another two years of a McConnell-led Senate. **In this urgent moment, I'm counting on you to step up with a donation to protect our future.[I'd like to ask one more time: Will you double your impact today to help flip the Senate blue?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc787/2a380d31/21bf5a0d/f05787/3026030811/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEwNF93YXJub2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210104_warnock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc787/2a380d31/21bf5a0d/f05787/3026030811/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEwNF93YXJub2NrMl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20210104_warnock2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Team Kelly
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Tomorrow is a big day in the Peach State. After several jam-packed weeks fighting for Georgians, Republicans have less than 24 hours to GET OUT THE VOTE in this historic election.
If you haven't voted yet, please make your plan now to cast your ballot for Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue tomorrow. Also, take a moment to call or text your friends, family members, neighbors, and co-workers before the polls open at 7AM tomorrow.
Kelly has recorded a special video message with Sonny Perdue about the importance of going to vote. Watch it [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KXfjlqs9_8RbMXc0qoGEPNjA2efNAftUUznQd0W-Ftu4TQHBF9lz1MPorJ28vrREIffTPjpESTIbEF8YPdMChuiQkIfZNPbb9oV322iI3Q1ER_V12LxDcPwFVIdCX0o6y-xR-jxeHG3UJje6946rfVnXdjY6vkfOfcZowt-t8UnlFjVtSTEOeg==&c=PR9rNlA3FtvOCAj8iIncJ4ad55JRwzxdI5nhB2wwWvUOiePXggfbDw==&ch=5DSmAGmkcBuc-dpMykvSqRwXB0AHn7ilsX7saULU6wWh-nvcr-eQnw==) or below, then find your polling location [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KXfjlqs9_8RbMXc0qoGEPNjA2efNAftUUznQd0W-Ftu4TQHBF9lz1Ni1vlNCxxbHrFOpr1vVzb8z3n3yya9MYOx8uWyYrxM0MOSoSNGhnZehv4a5ehtnSmW4Zu-vj7-Wgm5n1DPxE1n3-Un3weuhhoXFCbfs3PWUncKym9uh8Sc=&c=PR9rNlA3FtvOCAj8iIncJ4ad55JRwzxdI5nhB2wwWvUOiePXggfbDw==&ch=5DSmAGmkcBuc-dpMykvSqRwXB0AHn7ilsX7saULU6wWh-nvcr-eQnw==) \- or by clicking on the button below - and make a plan to vote.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Virginia Special Election Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Tomorrow, on Tuesday January 5th, there is a special election in the 2nd District seat in Virginia's House of Delegates, which includes parts of Prince William County and Stafford County. I'm writing to urge you to get out and vote for Democrat Candi King.

**Every vote in this special election is going to be critically important.** Turnout can be lower in special elections and Republicans are aiming to take back the gains in the General Assembly, gains that have been critical to expanding health care and voting rights to Virginians across the Commonwealth.

Candi King is a parent advocate for children with special needs and a community activist who will be a fighter for working families in the General Assembly. She'll work to make real progress on issues like paid leave and funding our public schools.

**Delivering real results in this partisan political environment is a long and ongoing process. We can 't turn back now.**

You can use this tool to look up your voting location: **[https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d95f/53d9897e/552cd58a/1c88db87/3018089586/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation")**

**If you 're in the 2nd District, make sure that your voice is heard tomorrow!** You can vote at your usual polling location between 6 am and 7 pm. If you have any additional questions about voting, you can call the Virginia Democrats voter protection hotline at 844-4VA-VOTE.

Thanks, |
---
-- Mark Warner

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d95f/53d9897e/552cd58a/1c88db86/3018089586/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: Phone Banks for Georgia Senate Races [January 4, 2021]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-** **Happy New Year! For many, especially those in Georgia, it was a hard working holiday as Democrats continued to work to flip the senate and win up and down the ballot in Georgia. Every bit of effort is making a serious difference, so please help us in these final two days to keep talking to voters via phone banks (see below). The numbers are incredible--which is why Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock are in competitive positions and locked in dead-heat races.** **As of this morning, over three million Georgians have voted early. There have been historic levels of turnout and enthusiasm around the state, with over 117,000 voters casting a ballot in this election who did not vote in the November election. But we are still fighting for every single vote. There are key ways to [take action](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cc3b329676&e=d6c5c7d7ec). ** **Winning both senate seats in Georgia could transform the way our country is governed. It would finally stop Mitch McConnell’s heartless obstructionism that’s prevented sensible, life saving legislation from being passed. Americans are in need of [economic relief](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c6afb3de11&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [funding for state and local governments](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9ec476a62a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to distribute a COVID vaccine and a clear path forward out of this pandemic. Georgia voters are keenly aware that everything they voted for in November – health care, jobs, the environment, education, racial justice – is still on the ballot January 5. ** **So many of our congressional colleagues have also remained busy at work and yesterday was the swearing in of the new 117th Congress. Congratulations to Speaker Nancy Pelosi who will continue to lead our party in the House of Representatives! And a huge thank you to our Democratic Members and their staff who have kept up the fight for COVID relief. Trump’s stunts caused 14 million workers to lose unemployment benefits for a week. But House Democrats passed $2,000 relief checks and fought for more comprehensive relief for working families. They are also ensuring that the House will continue to serve as a check on the remaining 16 days of Trump’s presidency. ** **Meanwhile, Trump continues to threaten to try and overthrow the will of the people and the outcomes of this legitimate, certified election. And so far, a shameful 140 House Republicans and a dozen Republican senators have said they are preparing to challenge the Electoral College Votes despite there being no evidence of voter fraud. ** **I listened to the full recording of Trump’s desperate****[call](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=03e8cb68e2&e=d6c5c7d7ec)****to Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger to overturn the election and threaten our democracy. Bob Bauer, legal advisor for the Biden campaign said it best, the recording “captures the whole, disgraceful story about Donald Trump’s assault on American democracy.” ** **As we know, this is only the latest in a series of attempts to subvert the will of American voters and make [baseless allegations about voter fraud](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=07b3fa7cfa&e=d6c5c7d7ec). As the [Washington Post](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3c38b66444&e=d6c5c7d7ec) recently reported, “With his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud rejected by dozens of judges and GOP leaders, President Trump has turned to a ragtag group of conspiracy theorists, media-hungry lawyers and other political misfits in a desperate attempt to hold on to power after his election loss.”** **However, even Senate Republicans and Trump’s allies have continued to speak out against Trump’s destructive efforts and tell him it’s time to move on. [Senate Majority Whip John Thune](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ec0e0262f9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) said, “I think the thing they got to remember is, it’s not going anywhere. I mean in the Senate, it would go down like a shot dog.”** **Yours In the Fight,** **Muthoni** **I****n this Update:**
* **President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris rallying Georgia Voters**
* **Georgia phone banks and canvassing opportunities**

**BIDEN IN ATLANTA TODAY, HARRIS RALLIED VOTERS THIS WEEKEND** **President-elect Biden will travel to Atlanta today to campaign alongside Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock. Biden will attend a car rally where he will urge Georgians to vote tomorrow, and highlight Warnock and Ossoff's fight to deliver Healthcare, Jobs, and Justice for all Georgians.[ Watch it live here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=723d861b2d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) at 4:15pm ET.** **Yesterday Vice President-elect Harris [campaigned](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=becbae0116&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for senate candidates Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock in Savannah, Georgia. During the campaign, the Vice President-elect criticized Trump’s actions to pressure Georgia’s Secretary of State to change his state's electoral results in the Presidential election.** _**Georgia Phone Banks **_ **DNC Friends and Allies Phone Bank**
* **TODAY--Monday, January 4, 6:00pm-8:00pm EST**

**Link: [https://events.democrats.org/event/365525/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=47f50dc5b9&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **AAPI Flip the Senate Phone Bank**
* **TODAY--Monday, January 4, 1:00pm-4:00pm EST; 4:00pm-7:00pm EST**
* **Tuesday, January 5, 10:00am–1:00pm EST; 1:00pm–4:00pm EST; 4:00pm–7:00pm EST**

**Link: [https://www.mobilize.us/georgiademocrats/event/366615/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=516551a0fe&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **DNC Black Caucus Phone Bank**
* **TODAY--Monday, January 4, 4:00pm-6:00pm EST**

**Link: [https://events.democrats.org/event/365919/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9595781e45&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **Labor Phone Bank**
* **TODAY--Monday, January 4, 2:00pm--4:00pm EST **
* **Tuesday, January 5, 6:00pm–8:00pm EST**

**Link:[https://www.mobilize.us/georgiademocrats/event/365805/?referring_vol=4330629&rname=Chris&share_context=event_details&share_medium=copy_link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7ab22da941&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **DNC Senior's Council Phone Bank**
* **Monday, January 4, 3:00pm–5:00pm EST**
* **Tuesday, January 5, 3:00pm–5:00pm EST**

**Link: [https://events.democrats.org/event/366647/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9fb231a262&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** _**AAPI Canvassing Opportunities**_ **Roll out the Bollywood Red Carpet: New Year, New Senate!** **Today, [Join](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=50a0f4179e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) our coalition to get-out-the-vote in Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) communities on the eve of the January 5th election! It's all hands on deck so we can break records with a historic AAPI voter turnout that will propel Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate!** **From 3pm-6pm ET, we'll be launching a socially-distant canvass shift and knocking on the doors of AAPI voters who still need to vote.** **In addition, please click[here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8cd0517f0b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for more information on canvassing opportunities by county in Georgia.** ** **
###

---
| | | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=82a7439f79&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8941f582fd&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6b5c5ba27b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1884eacdeb&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/about?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=830593aea9) [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=830593aea9) [update subscription preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
DNC Community Engagement * 430 S Capitol Street, SE * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I need your help (one day left)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Winning this race and taking back the Senate is within our reach.
Hey there, it's Jon.
This is one of the final emails I'll send you before my election tomorrow.
It's hard to believe, but this is it.
So it's now or never, team. [**And I 'm humbly asking, will you chip in $3 or more to my campaign and Senator Hassan to make sure we have the resources we need to win?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc783/2a380d31/21b2672c/f057cc/1563901763/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTAxMDRfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20210104_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Winning this race and taking back the Senate is within our reach. But right now, Raphael Warnock and I are being outspent by $80 million on TV. And in the final few days, that could be dangerous.
We need to make sure we can set the record straight. The GOP is trying to falsely tie me to terrorist sympathizers and the Chinese Communist Party. My opponent even ran an anti-Semitic ad against me.
But in order to do that, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you, everyone.
[**We have a winning strategy, with a campaign focused on addressing the issues of the people of Georgia and mobilizing these voters to get out and vote. Are you with me? Chip in $3 or more today to split between my campaign and Senator Hassan's >>**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc783/2a380d31/21b2672c/f057cc/1563901763/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTAxMDRfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20210104_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
